response.justification: Bogdan Szabo has relevant experience in software development and some exposure to AI and fintech, but lacks direct experience in agentic AI architecture and senior technical leadership at scale-ups.
strengths: Experience with diverse technologies and programming languages
Background in fintech-related projects and scalable systems
Strong open-source contributions and personal projects
concerns: Lacks direct experience with agentic AI and multi-agent systems
Not explicitly shown experience in senior technical leadership roles at scale-ups
Limited direct experience in fintech infrastructure

key_factors.factor: Lack of direct agentic AI experience
